ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the region */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parent category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this category represents */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon representing the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the category details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the method is applied */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis method */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the method details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., satellite name) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "orbit" TEXT /* Orbit of the satellite (if applicable) */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geospatial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being analyzed */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the results from the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geospatial data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_size" TEXT /* Size of the data version in bytes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated geospatial data */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., collection_date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata (e.g., 2023-01-01) */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis associated with the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" TEXT /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES data_analysis ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
